caption: A man with glasses and a distinctive tall, spiked silver hairpiece sits in a recording studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone. The background is a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs. To his left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon. To his right, text reads "BOSS TALK 101". In the background, clothing items, including a yellow shirt with the word "LEE" visible, hang on a rack. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and relatively still, facing slightly to the left. There is minimal movement as he maintains a neutral expression, with slight shifts in his posture and facial positioning as he appears to be listening or preparing to speak.
